artifacts.summary: Rewrote installation.md for beginner-friendly terminal walkthrough addressing all 8 research findings

completion_data.completion_summary: Rewrote docs/general/installation.md to be approachable for readers with no terminal experience: added terminal introduction, simplified all detection commands, added motivation sentences and what-you-should-see guidance per section, rewrote PATH instructions in plain language, and converted the final checklist to a numbered list.
